post.summary: Create a new event for a specific resource (Outlook integration)

parameters.description: ID of the event to update

patch.summary: Toggle the active status of an event
patch.description: Toggles the active flag of an event (soft delete/activate). When active=0, the event is effectively deleted but preserved in the database.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the event to toggle

active.description: Set active status explicitly (if not provided, it will be toggled)

post.summary: Create a new event for multiple resources
post.description: Creates a new event that can be associated with multiple resources. This endpoint reuses the single resource creation logic and adds additional resource associations.

requestBody.description: Event data with array of resources

resource_ids.description: Array of resource IDs to associate with the event

error.example: Invalid date format or missing required fields

404.description: One or more resources not found

409.description: Conflict - Time conflict with existing events/bookings

error.example: Time conflict on resource 123: Overlaps with existing event #456

parameters.description: Start date for the schedule (format: YYYY-MM-DD). Defaults to today if not provided.

get.summary: Get a list of public tables in the database
get.description: This endpoint returns a list of public tables in the database, including metadata about their columns.

nullable.description: Whether the column allows NULL values

primary_key.description: Whether the column is a primary key

unique_key.description: Whether the column has a unique constraint

has_default.description: Whether the column has a default value

get.summary: Get data from a specific table
get.description: This endpoint returns data from a specific table in the database. The structure of the returned dataset will depend on the chosen table.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of items per page. If set to a negative value, the entire dataset will be returned in one go.

200.description: Successful operation. The structure of the returned dataset will depend on the chosen table.

data.description: Array of records. The structure of each record will depend on the chosen table.

404.description: Table not found or no records found

ssn.description: Social Security Number (Norwegian format, 11 digits) - RESTRICTED: Not exposed to frontend for security

RelationInfo.description: Relation metadata used to enrich entity payloads with location and origin context.

origin.description: Origin context. Preferred format is {application}.{module}[.{submodule}] (for example property.ticket.category). Legacy dot-prefixed values (for example .ticket.category) are accepted and normalized with a property application fallback when resolving location.

values_attribute.description: EAV attribute values keyed by attribute ID

ProjectRelationInfo.description: Optional relation metadata used by legacy save flow

ProjectValues.description: Project core fields. Additional legacy keys may be accepted.

ProjectSavePayload.description: Payload accepted by both create and update endpoints

name.description: Top-level legacy field accepted when values is omitted
